mapper.select:
SELECT SUBSTR(CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, 1, POSSTR(CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') - 1) AS CMM_AGREE_FILE_NM , SUBSTR(CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, POSSTR(CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') + 1) AS CMM_AGREE_NM , CMMN_CNTRCT_FLG AS CMM_AGREE_CNTRCT_OFFER_CODE , SUBSTR(CTGRY_CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, 1, POSSTR(CTGRY_CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') - 1) AS CTGRY_CMM_AGREE_FILE_NM , SUBSTR(CTGRY_CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, POSSTR(CTGRY_CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') + 1) AS CTGRY_CMM_AGREE_NM , CTGRY_CNTRCT_FLG AS CTGRY_CMM_AGREE_CNTRCT_OFFER_CODE , SUBSTR(PRDCTP_AFT_FILE_NM, 1, POSSTR(PRDCTP_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') - 1) AS PRDCT_AGREE_FILE_NM , SUBSTR(PRDCTP_AFT_FILE_NM, POSSTR(PRDCTP_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') + 1) AS PRDCT_AGREE_NM , PRDCTP_CNTRCT_FLG AS PRDCT_AGREE_CNTRCT_OFFER_CODE , SUBSTR(PRDCTE_AFT_FILE_NM, 1, POSSTR(PRDCTE_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') - 1) AS PRDCT_EXPLN_FILE_NM , SUBSTR(PRDCTE_AFT_FILE_NM, POSSTR(PRDCTE_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') + 1) AS PRDCT_EXPLN_NM , PRDCTE_CNTRCT_FLG AS PRDCT_EXPLN_CNTRCT_OFFER_CODE , PRDCT_ID FROM (SELECT SUBSTR((SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENFRCMNT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM || '|' || PM.PRVSN_NM AS ENFRCMNT_DT2 FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT P, PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT PM WHERE P.PRVSN_ID = A.CMMN_PRVSN_ID AND P.PRVSN_ID = PM.PRVSN_ID
AND P.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT2 || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), 11) AS CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM , CMMN_CNTRCT_FLG , SUBSTR((SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENFRCMNT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM || '|' || PM.PRVSN_NM AS ENFRCMNT_DT2 FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT P, PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT PM WHERE P.PRVSN_ID = A.CTGRY_CMMN_PRVSN_ID AND P.PRVSN_ID = PM.PRVSN_ID
AND P.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT2 || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), 11) AS CTGRY_CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM , CTGRY_CNTRCT_FLG , SUBSTR((SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENFRCMNT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM || '|' || PM.PRVSN_NM AS ENFRCMNT_DT2 FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT P, PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT PM WHERE P.PRVSN_ID = A.PRDCT_PRVSN_ID AND P.PRVSN_ID = PM.PRVSN_ID
AND P.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT2 || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), 11) AS PRDCTP_AFT_FILE_NM , PRDCTP_CNTRCT_FLG , SUBSTR((SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENFRCMNT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM || '|' || PM.PRVSN_NM AS ENFRCMNT_DT2 FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT P, PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT PM WHERE P.PRVSN_ID = A.PRDCT_EXPLN_DOC_ID AND P.PRVSN_ID = PM.PRVSN_ID
AND P.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT2 || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), 11) AS PRDCTE_AFT_FILE_NM , PRDCTE_CNTRCT_FLG , A.PRDCT_ID FROM PRDCT_DISCLOSURE_MGT A WHERE (1=1 OR PUB_NTC_PRDCT_TYPE_CD = #{pubNtcPrdctTypeCd}) AND A.BULLTN_FLG = '1' FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY WITH UR )

SELECT SUBSTR(CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, 1, POSSTR(CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') - 1) AS CMM_AGREE_FILE_NM , SUBSTR(CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, POSSTR(CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') + 1) AS CMM_AGREE_NM , CMMN_CNTRCT_FLG AS CMM_AGREE_CNTRCT_OFFER_CODE , SUBSTR(CTGRY_CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, 1, POSSTR(CTGRY_CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') - 1) AS CTGRY_CMM_AGREE_FILE_NM , SUBSTR(CTGRY_CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, POSSTR(CTGRY_CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') + 1) AS CTGRY_CMM_AGREE_NM , CTGRY_CNTRCT_FLG AS CTGRY_CMM_AGREE_CNTRCT_OFFER_CODE , SUBSTR(PRDCTP_AFT_FILE_NM, 1, POSSTR(PRDCTP_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') - 1) AS PRDCT_AGREE_FILE_NM , SUBSTR(PRDCTP_AFT_FILE_NM, POSSTR(PRDCTP_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') + 1) AS PRDCT_AGREE_NM , PRDCTP_CNTRCT_FLG AS PRDCT_AGREE_CNTRCT_OFFER_CODE , SUBSTR(PRDCTE_AFT_FILE_NM, 1, POSSTR(PRDCTE_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') - 1) AS PRDCT_EXPLN_FILE_NM , SUBSTR(PRDCTE_AFT_FILE_NM, POSSTR(PRDCTE_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') + 1) AS PRDCT_EXPLN_NM , PRDCTE_CNTRCT_FLG AS PRDCT_EXPLN_CNTRCT_OFFER_CODE , PRDCT_ID FROM (SELECT SUBSTR((SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENFRCMNT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM || '|' || PM.PRVSN_NM AS ENFRCMNT_DT2 FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT P, PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT PM WHERE P.PRVSN_ID = A.CMMN_PRVSN_ID AND P.PRVSN_ID = PM.PRVSN_ID
AND P.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT2 || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), 11) AS CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM , CMMN_CNTRCT_FLG , SUBSTR((SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENFRCMNT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM || '|' || PM.PRVSN_NM AS ENFRCMNT_DT2 FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT P, PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT PM WHERE P.PRVSN_ID = A.CTGRY_CMMN_PRVSN_ID AND P.PRVSN_ID = PM.PRVSN_ID
AND P.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT2 || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), 11) AS CTGRY_CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM , CTGRY_CNTRCT_FLG , SUBSTR((SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENFRCMNT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM || '|' || PM.PRVSN_NM AS ENFRCMNT_DT2 FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT P, PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT PM WHERE P.PRVSN_ID = A.PRDCT_PRVSN_ID AND P.PRVSN_ID = PM.PRVSN_ID
AND P.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT2 || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), 11) AS PRDCTP_AFT_FILE_NM , PRDCTP_CNTRCT_FLG , SUBSTR((SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENFRCMNT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM || '|' || PM.PRVSN_NM AS ENFRCMNT_DT2 FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT P, PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT PM WHERE P.PRVSN_ID = A.PRDCT_EXPLN_DOC_ID AND P.PRVSN_ID = PM.PRVSN_ID
AND P.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT2 || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), 11) AS PRDCTE_AFT_FILE_NM , PRDCTE_CNTRCT_FLG , A.PRDCT_ID FROM PRDCT_DISCLOSURE_MGT A WHERE PUB_NTC_PRDCT_TYPE_CD = #{pubNtcPrdctTypeCd} AND A.BULLTN_FLG = '1'
AND A.PUB_ANNUNCMNT_OEPN_DT <= SYSDATE AND A.PUB_ANNUNCMNT_END_DT >= SYSDATE
)

SELECT SUBSTR(CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, 1, POSSTR(CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') - 1) AS CMM_AGREE_FILE_NM --공통약관파일명 , SUBSTR(CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, POSSTR(CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') + 1) AS CMM_AGREE_NM --공통약관명 , CMMN_CNTRCT_FLG AS CMM_AGREE_CNTRCT_OFFER_CODE --공통약관아이디계약서류제공코드 1:홈페이지,2:계약서류,3:홈+계약서류 , SUBSTR(CTGRY_CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, 1, POSSTR(CTGRY_CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') - 1) AS CTGRY_CMM_AGREE_FILE_NM -- 카테고리공통약관파일명 , SUBSTR(CTGRY_CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, POSSTR(CTGRY_CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') + 1) AS CTGRY_CMM_AGREE_NM --카테고리공통약관명 , CTGRY_CNTRCT_FLG AS CTGRY_CMM_AGREE_CNTRCT_OFFER_CODE --카테고리공통약관아이디계약서류제공코드 1:홈페이지,2:계약서류,3:홈+계약서류 , SUBSTR(PRDCTP_AFT_FILE_NM, 1, POSSTR(PRDCTP_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') - 1) AS PRDCT_AGREE_FILE_NM --상품약관명파일명 , SUBSTR(PRDCTP_AFT_FILE_NM, POSSTR(PRDCTP_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') + 1) AS PRDCT_AGREE_NM --상품약관명 , PRDCTP_CNTRCT_FLG AS PRDCT_AGREE_CNTRCT_OFFER_CODE--상품약관아이디계약서류제공코드 1:홈페이지,2:계약서류,3:홈+계약서류 , SUBSTR(PRDCTE_AFT_FILE_NM, 1, POSSTR(PRDCTE_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') - 1) AS PRDCT_EXPLN_FILE_NM --상품설명서파일명 , SUBSTR(PRDCTE_AFT_FILE_NM, POSSTR(PRDCTE_AFT_FILE_NM, '|') + 1) AS PRDCT_EXPLN_NM --상품설명서명 , PRDCTE_CNTRCT_FLG AS PRDCT_EXPLN_CNTRCT_OFFER_CODE--상품설명서계약서류제공코드 1:홈페이지,2:계약서류,3:홈+계약서류 , PRDCT_ID , MAPPING_CD1 , MAPPING_CD2 , MAPPING_CD3 FROM (SELECT SUBSTR((SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENFRCMNT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM || '|' || PM.PRVSN_NM AS ENFRCMNT_DT2 FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT P, PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT PM WHERE P.PRVSN_ID = A.CMMN_PRVSN_ID AND P.PRVSN_ID = PM.PRVSN_ID
AND P.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT2 || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), 11) AS CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM , CMMN_CNTRCT_FLG , SUBSTR((SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENFRCMNT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM || '|' || PM.PRVSN_NM AS ENFRCMNT_DT2 FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT P, PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT PM WHERE P.PRVSN_ID = A.CTGRY_CMMN_PRVSN_ID AND P.PRVSN_ID = PM.PRVSN_ID
AND P.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT2 || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), 11) AS CTGRY_CMMN_AFT_FILE_NM , CTGRY_CNTRCT_FLG , SUBSTR((SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENFRCMNT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM || '|' || PM.PRVSN_NM AS ENFRCMNT_DT2 FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT P, PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT PM WHERE P.PRVSN_ID = A.PRDCT_PRVSN_ID AND P.PRVSN_ID = PM.PRVSN_ID
AND P.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT2 || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), 11) AS PRDCTP_AFT_FILE_NM , PRDCTP_CNTRCT_FLG , SUBSTR((SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENFRCMNT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM || '|' || PM.PRVSN_NM AS ENFRCMNT_DT2 FROM PRDCT_PRVSN_UPDATE_MGT P, PRDCT_PRVSN_MGT PM WHERE P.PRVSN_ID = A.PRDCT_EXPLN_DOC_ID AND P.PRVSN_ID = PM.PRVSN_ID
AND P.ENFRCMNT_DT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY ENFRCMNT_DT2 || AMNDMNT_AFT_FILE_NM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), 11) AS PRDCTE_AFT_FILE_NM , PRDCTE_CNTRCT_FLG , A.PRDCT_ID , B.MAPPING_CD1 , B.MAPPING_CD2 , B.MAPPING_CD3 FROM PRDCT_DISCLOSURE_MGT A, PRDCT_VARIETYCD_MGT B WHERE A.PRDCT_ID = B.PRDCT_ID
AND A.PUB_ANNUNCMNT_OEPN_DT <= SYSDATE AND A.PUB_ANNUNCMNT_END_DT >= SYSDATE
AND A.BULLTN_FLG = '1' AND B.MAPPING_CD1 = #{mappingCd1} AND B.MAPPING_CD2 = #{mappingCd2} AND B.MAPPING_CD3 = #{mappingCd3} ) WITH UR
